title: Freestyle Application
description: At Berg Software we're passionate about software development and proud of our achievements. With more than 30 years of hard work, we have a strong expertise in developing and implementing complex projects for global clients. 'The Berg Squad' has both the hard and the soft skills. We cover multiple technologies (beyond just web and cloud) for several industries (manufacturing, retail, IT, data storage etc). Our employees maintain the life-work balance, while always respecting each other. We have created a high-performance workplace that's also fun.
description_short: Freestyle application for software development roles. Remote full-time position at Berg Software.

title: Jr. React / JavaScript UI Developer
description: Jr. React / JavaScript UI Developer position at Concept Plus

title: Web and Graphic Designer
description: Join Our Creative Team at High Five Media! Are you a talented web and graphic designer with a passion for creating stunning digital experiences? High Five Media is looking for a skilled designer with 3+ years of hands-on experience to join our dynamic team. If you thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and are an expert in Adobe Creative Suite, we want to hear from you! As a key member of our creative team, you'll be responsible for designing eye-catching websites and graphic design projects that make a real impact for our diverse range of clients. Your expertise will shine across a variety of projects—from custom Squarespace sites and marketing collateral to brand design and campaign creative—all while balancing creativity with fast-paced production demands. What We're Looking For: 3+ years of professional web and graphic design experience; Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, etc.) is a must; Solid working experience with Squarespace or WordPress is a must; Working experience with Shopify is a valuable plus; A keen eye for design, with the ability to translate concepts into beautiful, functional websites; Ability to thrive both in a collaborative team environment and when tackling projects independently; Strong communication skills to work effectively with both our internal team and clients; A positive, proactive attitude and a desire to grow with our team. Benefits include: 14 days PTO, 9 paid holidays, paid medical insurance, matching 401(k), maternity/paternity leave. Also offering a Paid Internship track for candidates not yet fully qualified.
description_short: Web and Graphic Designer at High Five Media. 3+ years experience required. Adobe Creative Suite, Squarespace/WordPress required. In-office only. Paid internship track available.
